title: Sadamotos Artwork Images
wikitext:
[]: Sadamoto's Artwork Images             Quote Post by Nephilim » Sun Sep 19, 2004 2:35 pm Hi Guys !!! As some of you know, i'm a huge fan of Sadamoto's Artwork, and i have almost all of his images. Just a few moments ago i saw an awesome image that i've never saw before, this one: Bigger image here:[url]http://img.photobucket.com/albums/v313/nefilim/KaworuWithCat.jpg[/url] I opened this topic so anyone else who likes his artwork could post rare images of Sadamoto, maybe from the covers of the Platinum Edition, or the Mangas.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Mon Sep 20, 2004 12:29 am Wow, Neph! That is a really awesome image! I havent seen a big version of it. Again, if I had any kind of rare Sadamoto scans, I'd surely post them. But my collection basically consists of Der Monde and some of Die Sterne. Which is nothing new...

[]:             Quote Post by Vulkurt » Mon Sep 20, 2004 9:15 am That's awesome. If anyone ever sees any Sadamoto images from "Tale of Two Robots," please let me know.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon Sep 20, 2004 12:03 pm Indeed that's an awesome image...

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Mon Sep 20, 2004 7:15 pm OMG LOVE <333333333 Now I totally wanna have sex with Sadamoto <3

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Sep 20, 2004 7:21 pm wildarmsheero wrote: OMG LOVE <333333333 Now I totally wanna have sex with Sadamoto <3

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Mon Sep 20, 2004 11:06 pm ~I wouldent go as far as to have intercourse with to man!! ~not a fan of karwo but i think the pic's nice.

[]:             Quote Post by advent_child » Tue Sep 21, 2004 6:00 am that's a fantastic image...where did you find it?

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Tue Sep 21, 2004 3:04 pm Nephilim, didn't you post a big .zip file of a lot of Sadamoto's work? Where is it?

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Tue Sep 21, 2004 9:20 pm GIVE ME THE LOCATION AND CURRENT STATUS OF THIS ZIP FILE. Please?

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Tue Sep 21, 2004 9:23 pm There was a link to the zip file in this thread , but I don't know if Neph moved things around.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Wed Sep 22, 2004 12:45 am THe file is right here. Its a 10 mb zip file with all the Sadamoto's Artwork that i have. [url]http://www.med.ufro.cl/tecmed/cachureos/claudio/Sadamoto.zip[/url] Please, if someone have pictures that aren't in that zip, POST THEM !!! That's why this topic was created :P

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Wed Sep 22, 2004 7:59 am You could probably dig something up at [url]http://www.animegalleries.net/[/url] or [url]http://www.csusm.edu/anime/galleries/[/url].

[]:             Quote Post by Beatle » Wed Sep 22, 2004 12:28 pm That picture is from a set of Bandai cards. I was just going though my set and reconized it. The picture at the top of this thread is a scan from the card because of the rounded corners and the writing on it. If anyone is interested, I would be glad to scan all the cards I have.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Wed Sep 22, 2004 6:27 pm I will probably download them next month

[]:             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Thu Sep 23, 2004 1:42 am That's so~o beautiful... <3 I wonder what the cat and the statue symbolize.

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Thu Sep 23, 2004 8:35 am Best. Sadomot. Rei drawing. EVAR!!! http://www.evangelion-armageddon.com/Galerie/Rei/Rei431.jpg NISSAN SKYLINE R34 = R0XXXXXX0RZZ!!!

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Sep 23, 2004 3:18 pm That's one of my favorite images: http://img35.exs.cx/img35/8701/volume9.gif

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Thu Sep 23, 2004 3:45 pm the_seventh_child wrote: That's one of my favorite images: http://img35.exs.cx/img35/8701/volume9.gif

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Sep 24, 2004 9:37 am It's a little hard to find it on a bigger size..but i'll try..

[]: Sadamoto's Artwork Images             Quote Post by Nephilim » Sun Sep 19, 2004 2:35 pm Hi Guys !!! As some of you know, i'm a huge fan of Sadamoto's Artwork, and i have almost all of his images. Just a few moments ago i saw an awesome image that i've never saw before, this one: Bigger image here:[url]http://img.photobucket.com/albums/v313/nefilim/KaworuWithCat.jpg[/url] I opened this topic so anyone else who likes his artwork could post rare images of Sadamoto, maybe from the covers of the Platinum Edition, or the Mangas.

Again, if I had any kind of rare Sadamoto scans, I'd surely post them. But my collection basically consists of Der Monde and some of Die Sterne. Which is nothing new...
